## Checklist

Before submitting:

- [ ] I have read the Engineering Principles.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if necessary.
- [ ] Existing architecture has been respected.
- [ ] No undocumented interfaces were introduced.
- [ ] No assumptions were made without verification.
- [ ] Tests or validation have been performed.
